author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text: It's that time of the year again, @fosdem is happening in 3 days 🌟 and this time I'm coming with a bunch of @IPFSbot people. Howler if you will be there and/or want to chat about the Distributed Web #DWEB
